title: Input schema of the Grocery Price Index

retailers.title: Retailers to Scrape
retailers.description: List of supermarket retailer identifiers to scrape. Supported: walmart, kroger, wholefoods, target, aldi.

categories.title: Product Categories
categories.description: Grocery categories to monitor. Options: dairy, bread, meat, produce, beverages, snacks, frozen, canned.

startUrls.title: Custom Start URLs
startUrls.description: Optional: provide direct URLs to specific supermarket category or search pages to scrape instead of using the built-in retailer list.

trackPriceHistory.title: Track Price History
trackPriceHistory.description: If enabled, each run compares prices against the previous run stored in the key-value store and flags items with price changes.

minPriceChangePct.title: Minimum Price Change % to Flag
minPriceChangePct.description: Minimum percentage price change to flag as notable inflation/deflation. E.g. 5 means flag items that changed by ±5% or more.

maxRequestsPerCrawl.title: Max Requests per Crawl
maxRequestsPerCrawl.description: Maximum number of HTTP requests the crawler will make per run.

maxProductsPerCategory.title: Max Products per Category
maxProductsPerCategory.description: Maximum number of products to collect per category per retailer.

zipCode.title: ZIP Code (for localised pricing)
zipCode.description: US ZIP code used to localise prices where supported by the retailer.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Rotating residential proxies are recommended for major retailers.
